name: @tsnuke/module-graph-effect
description: Effect-native rewrite of tsnuke's GRAPH-tier module-graph builder (legacy packages/core/src/module-graph.ts). `buildModuleGraph(files)` is a PURE synchronous function: it takes file CONTENTS (not the filesystem), parses each via the TS compiler API, resolves RELATIVE import/export/dynamic-import specifiers against the in-project file set, and assembles the cross-file ModuleGraph (imports/exports/usedExports/wildcardUsed) that the GRAPH rules + engine consume. NOT Effect-wrapped (no I/O — reading files is the engine's FileSystem concern). Imports the ModuleGraph TYPE from @tsnuke/rules-core-effect; uses `typescript` + `node:path` at runtime.
